h1: Custom Bluetooth Keyboards for Branded Promotions
metaDescription: Order custom Bluetooth keyboards for corporate gifts and trade shows. Personalize with your logo. Bulk pricing available. Shop now at Perfect Imprints.
introHtml:
Custom Bluetooth keyboards combine functionality with portability, making them a practical promotional item for businesses. Made from durable materials like ABS plastic and aluminum, these keyboards feature scissor-switch or membrane keys for comfortable typing. Their wireless connectivity works with tablets, smartphones, and laptops, ensuring broad usability.

For bulk orders, you can choose from various keyboard sizes—full, compact, or folding—to suit different user preferences. Decoration options include laser engraving, pad printing, or full-color UV printing on the keys or casing. Many models offer rechargeable batteries with long standby times, reducing the need for frequent replacements.

Perfect Imprints provides custom Bluetooth keyboards ideal for corporate gifts, trade show giveaways, or employee onboarding kits. Marketing directors appreciate the high perceived value, while HR directors can use them for remote work kits. With minimum order quantities starting at 50 units, these keyboards scale well for large campaigns.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom Bluetooth keyboards?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities typically start at 50 units, but this can vary by model. Some premium or folding keyboards may have higher minimums. Contact your account manager for specific product MOQs.

faqs.q: Can I print my logo on the keys or the casing?
faqs.a: Yes. You can choose pad printing or laser engraving on the keys for a professional look, or full-color UV printing on the top casing for a larger logo. Some models also allow custom keycaps.

faqs.q: How long does it take to produce custom Bluetooth keyboards?
faqs.a: Production lead time is typically 10-15 business days after approval of the artwork proof. Rush orders may be available for an additional fee. Shipping time depends on your location and chosen method.

faqs.q: What sizes and colors are available for custom keyboards?
faqs.a: Keyboards come in full-size (with numeric keypad), compact (tenkeyless), and folding designs. Common colors include black, white, and silver, but some models offer custom color matching for larger quantities.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a large order?
faqs.a: Yes, samples are available. You can order a blank or pre-decorated sample to evaluate the build, feel, and print quality. Sample costs are often credited back on the final order.

heroAltText: Custom Bluetooth keyboards with engraved logos on keys and casing for corporate promotional gifts
